# HVAC Tools Hub

HVAC Tools Hub is a practical, tool-first reference site for HVAC capacity, airflow, duct geometry, and preliminary load-planning questions. It helps homeowners, technicians, students, and HVAC professionals check transparent unit conversions and early calculations; it does not replace project-specific design methods, applicable codes, or qualified professional review.

## Core Calculators

- https://hvactoolshub.com/tool/btu-calculator.html
  - Converts thermal capacity between BTU/h, watts, kilowatts, and refrigeration tons.
- https://hvactoolshub.com/tool/btu-to-tons-calculator.html
  - Converts a BTU/h capacity value to nominal refrigeration tons.
- https://hvactoolshub.com/tool/tons-to-btu-calculator.html
  - Converts nominal refrigeration tons to BTU/h capacity.

## Refrigeration Tools

- https://hvactoolshub.com/tool/refrigeration-capacity-calculator.html
  - Calculates refrigerant-side thermal capacity from documented mass flow and evaporator enthalpy difference.
- https://hvactoolshub.com/tool/refrigerant-superheat-calculator.html
  - Calculates a matched suction-line temperature difference above saturation without generating refrigerant property data.
- https://hvactoolshub.com/tool/refrigerant-subcooling-calculator.html
  - Calculates a matched liquid-line temperature difference below saturation without supplying a charging target.

## Psychrometric Tools

- https://hvactoolshub.com/tool/psychrometric-calculator.html
  - Calculates core moist-air properties from dry bulb, relative humidity, and total pressure.

## Airflow Tools

- https://hvactoolshub.com/tool/cfm-calculator.html
  - Converts room dimensions and a documented ACH basis into CFM.
- https://hvactoolshub.com/tool/air-changes-per-hour-calculator.html
  - Converts identified CFM and room volume into air changes per hour.
- https://hvactoolshub.com/tool/cfm-per-square-foot-calculator.html
  - Calculates an airflow-to-area ratio for a stated airflow and area boundary.
- https://hvactoolshub.com/tool/cfm-to-cubic-meters-per-hour.html
  - Converts CFM to cubic metres per hour.
- https://hvactoolshub.com/tool/cubic-meters-per-hour-to-cfm.html
  - Converts cubic metres per hour to CFM.

## Duct Tools

- https://hvactoolshub.com/tool/duct-size-calculator.html
  - Calculates a theoretical round duct diameter from assigned CFM and target velocity.
- https://hvactoolshub.com/tool/rectangular-duct-size-calculator.html
  - Calculates preliminary rectangular duct dimensions from airflow, velocity, and aspect ratio.
- https://hvactoolshub.com/tool/equivalent-duct-diameter-calculator.html
  - Estimates equal-friction round diameter from rectangular duct dimensions.
- https://hvactoolshub.com/tool/duct-velocity-calculator.html
  - Calculates velocity for round or rectangular duct geometry.
- https://hvactoolshub.com/tool/duct-friction-loss-calculator.html
  - Calculates a transparent straight-round-duct Darcy-Weisbach pressure-loss estimate.

## Load Calculation Tools

- https://hvactoolshub.com/tool/hvac-load-calculator.html
  - Aggregates documented preliminary envelope, solar, internal, and outdoor-air sensible load components.
- https://hvactoolshub.com/tool/room-btu-calculator.html
  - Calculates a room planning capacity from area and an explicit planning rate.
- https://hvactoolshub.com/tool/btu-per-square-foot-calculator.html
  - Calculates a thermal-capacity-to-area comparison metric.

## Guides

- https://hvactoolshub.com/blog/what-is-btu.html
  - Explains BTU energy, BTU/h capacity, and common HVAC capacity labels.
- https://hvactoolshub.com/blog/how-to-calculate-btu.html
  - Describes a transparent preliminary BTU/h load workflow and its limits.
- https://hvactoolshub.com/blog/what-is-cfm-in-hvac.html
  - Explains CFM and the HVAC air streams it can describe.
- https://hvactoolshub.com/blog/air-changes-per-hour-explained.html
  - Explains ACH as an airflow-to-room-volume relationship.
- https://hvactoolshub.com/blog/how-to-size-hvac-ductwork.html
  - Describes the airflow-to-area-to-velocity duct-sizing workflow.
- https://hvactoolshub.com/blog/how-to-calculate-hvac-load.html
  - Explains the inputs and sequence for a preliminary HVAC load review.

- https://hvactoolshub.com/blog/superheat-vs-subcooling-explained.html
  - Explains the separate matched saturation-temperature differences used for superheat and subcooling.
- https://hvactoolshub.com/blog/how-to-calculate-refrigeration-capacity.html
  - Explains refrigerant-side capacity from a documented mass-flow and enthalpy-difference boundary.

## Comparisons

- https://hvactoolshub.com/compare/btu-vs-hvac-tons.html
  - Compares BTU/h and refrigeration tons as thermal-capacity labels.
- https://hvactoolshub.com/compare/btu-vs-kw.html
  - Compares BTU/h and thermal kW while separating electrical input.
- https://hvactoolshub.com/compare/cfm-vs-air-changes-per-hour.html
  - Compares a stated volume flow with its room-volume-normalized ACH value.
- https://hvactoolshub.com/compare/round-duct-vs-rectangular-duct.html
  - Compares round and rectangular duct geometry, routing, and pressure-path considerations.
- https://hvactoolshub.com/compare/manual-j-vs-rule-of-thumb-hvac-sizing.html
  - Compares a screening estimate with a formal residential load method.

## Reference Data

- https://hvactoolshub.com/reference/btu-conversion-reference.html
  - Provides BTU, thermal watt, thermal kW, and refrigeration-ton conversion relationships.
- https://hvactoolshub.com/reference/cfm-conversion-chart.html
  - Provides CFM and cubic-metres-per-hour conversion rows.
- https://hvactoolshub.com/reference/hvac-airflow-reference-table.html
  - Provides airflow, ACH, room-volume, and metric conversion formulas.
- https://hvactoolshub.com/reference/hvac-duct-size-chart.html
  - Provides round-duct area lookup values for preliminary velocity checks.
- https://hvactoolshub.com/reference/duct-friction-rate-reference.html
  - Defines straight-duct friction-rate inputs, units, formula, and limits.

- https://hvactoolshub.com/reference/refrigeration-units-reference.html
  - Provides capacity, mass-flow, enthalpy, and temperature-difference unit relationships for refrigeration checks.

## Site Information

- https://hvactoolshub.com/about/
  - Explains the site purpose, content types, and professional-review boundary.
- https://hvactoolshub.com/contact/
  - Provides the site contact guidance and issue-reporting categories.
- https://hvactoolshub.com/privacy/
  - Explains the current Google Analytics and privacy approach.
- https://hvactoolshub.com/disclaimer/
  - States the planning-only limits of site tools and content.
